data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. SIR MAURICE finished fourth of 10 two runs back at Eagle Farm then improved last start when he finished third of 11 over 1200m at Sunshine Coast after making a slow beginning. He has placed in four of his last five runs and will be well supported to take this race out. 2. LUDIK came home well from fifth of 13 over to score over today's course and distance last start after getting held up into the turn. Jumps from the inside draw and rates well as a main danger. 7. YEAH COPY has placed second in both of his last two runs, including last time out over today's course and distance after having to race wide for the entire trip after jumping from a wide draw. Hasn't drawn well again today but with luck in the running can finish in the money once again.","runners":[4,2,7],"exclusive":true}
